chunks.title: Description of God's Power in Nature
chunks.reason: Elihu describes the thunder and weather as manifestations of God's voice and control.

chunks.title: Call to Job to Consider God's Wonders
chunks.reason: Elihu directly addresses Job, urging him to observe and acknowledge God's majesty.

chunks.title: Conclusion on God's Incomprehensible Majesty
chunks.reason: Elihu concludes that God is beyond human discovery and worthy of fear due to His perfect justice.
